basic_details.job_title: DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Protection Officer, Outreach Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai (DCPU Sivagangai)
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai (DCPU Sivagangai) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) and Outreach Worker posts! Published at www.sivagangai.nic.in, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the specified age group and possessing qualifications such as a Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management or any degree with relevant experience (for Protection Officer) and 12th P

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management, Any degree with 2 years experience in women and child development / social welfare works, 12th Pass
qualification.details: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights (Public Administration) / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized university OR any degree with 2 years experience in planning/implementation/monitoring/supervision of women and child development / social welfare works. Must have full proficiency in computer handling. Outreach Worker: 12th Pass. Preference to candidates with experience in child-related work.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sivagangai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
